creator: ncrogers@gmail.com
text: I attached a diff to the port to upgrade to 3.0.6. It seems to work for me. I was not sure the correct/easiest way to update the pkg-plist. I ran make makeplist and then sort of manually included the changes to the list of dictionary files and docs, which seems to be the only things that have changed since 3.0.4, as expected.
